dialogos.texto_en: Hey, there you guys are.\nHey...
What do you want?
(Wh-what's up with Itsuki?\n I didn't do anything, did I?)
Hey, Nino.\nWhat's up with Itsuki?
She's just in a bit of a tizzy.\nDon't worry about it, it happens all the time.
(She told me not to worry but...)
(I don't know why Itsuki's angry,\n but I'll leave her alone for now.)
Nino, is there anything you want to do later?\nSightseeing, shopping, anything's fine.
Oh? What's the sudden change for?\nAre you asking me out on a date or something?
Like that'll ever happen.\nYotsuba wants to hear your thoughts,\nso I came for her sake.
Yotsuba?
*sigh*\nThat girl really doesn't change.
Come on, Yotsuba.\nLearn to put yourself first.
What's up?\nIf you want to do something, just say it.
I don't have anything in particular.\nYou and Yotsuba can decide, Fu-kun.
Hey, Itsuki.\nCan I ask you something?
...What's up?
Do you want to do something later?\nH-hey! Like, go on a sweets tour or something!\nYou'd love that!
...Huh?
Why are you asking me that?
Yotsuba and Fu-kun want to hear our thoughts.\nCome on, answer.
...Whatever you two want to do is fine.
Is what she says.
O-okay.\nThanks, Itsuki.
So, what's up, Fu-kun?\nDo you need something from us?
Do you two have anything you want to do later?\nYotsuba wants to adjust her plans to what\neveryone wants to do.
Alright then, how about a gourmet tour\nof tasting different local specialties?\nWhat do you think, Itsuki?
Uuuuuuurk...
Oh, I'm kidding, just kidding.\nLet's skip the gourmet tour.
Anything else is fine.\nYou and Yotsuba can decide, Fu-kun.
Itsuki, you're okay with that too, right?
...Yes.
(I've achieved my goal for now, but...)
Come on, Itsuki.\nYou should cheer up.\nFu-kun is worried about you too, you know?
Nino, you probably just don't understand\nhow I feel.\nThat's why it's easy for you to say that.
Hey, hey...\nWhat's really going on here?
Snacking.
Huh?
Itsuki bought tacos\nfrom a food truck on the way here%p-2;――
WAAA! NINO!\nDon't say anything!
Apparently, she was told by the food truck owner...
'Aren't you the girl who bought some tacos here earlier?\nYou're still growing, so you need to eat a lot!'
I-I'm not the one who bought them!\nI think someone else got them first,\nand confused them with me!!
By the way, it wasn't me, okay?
Well, judging from the length of her hair,\nit's probably Miku%p-2;――
But it's too early to jump to conclusions.
Yotsuba and Ichika wouldn't be able to do it\nwithout disguises.
Well, maybe you were still hungry Itsuki,\nso you unconsciously went again%p-2;――
I DID NOT!\nYou are really just the RUDEST!
*sigh*\nThis makes it seem like I'm a big eater or something.
Huh?
What was that just now?\nWhat are you trying to say?\nWhy don't you just say it so all of us can hear?
Don't pressure me with that smile!!!\nIt's SUPER scary!!!
Okay, okay, both of you, be quiet.\nAnd Fu-kun, please don't make things more complicated.
I am being quiet!
(...Is she throwing a tantrum?)
I guess I misjudged the situation.\nMan, quintuplets are such a pain.
The food truck owner didn't mean anything bad by it.\nIt was just a misunderstanding, right?
Or maybe you were just too\nself-conscious about it,\nand that's why you feel the way you do.
When you're in your swimsuit you've got\nto be aware.\nEspecially%p-2;――
WHAAA!!
No looking allowed! That's forbidden!\nYou too, Uesugi-kun!!
What? I'm not looking at anything?\nAnd why did you suddenly crouch down?
Well...
Don't needlessly resist, and stand up.\nYou're getting in the way like that.
Ooohh...
I guess I misjudged the situation.\nMan, quintuplets are such a pain.
I bet the food truck owner was happy, you know?\nThey probably loved that you\ncame back to buy more.
True, they must've been glad.
You're always smiling when you're shopping for food.\nSo it's hard not to make the other person\nthink you love the food they make, right?
Indeed...\nIt was so delicious\nthat I would want to buy it again...
It was delicious...but...\nOooohhh... If I went there again,\nI might be told...
Okay, okay.\nWhen that happens,\nI'll go and buy it for you instead.
Really?\nThanks in advance, Nino!
(She's already decided on \n buying another one, huh.)
I guess I misjudged the situation.\nMan, quintuplets are such a pain.
I wonder if there's a way\nto distinguish ourselves with hairstyles or swimsuits?
Well, they have to deal\nwith dozens of people every day, you know?
If they don't consciously pay attention\nto the customers' hair length or clothing,\nit's hard for them to remember.
That's true...
For now, even if we're all together,\nno one has made a fuss about it,\nso maybe they're not that concerned about other people.
That's right. After all, everyone around\nis just here to have fun.
Well, if we all wear the same thing,\nit'd be a different story.
Hey, spare us that.\nIt'll just cause a commotion.
...You're right.\nI was probably just worrying too much.
Yeah, it seems like I was just a little shaken\nby their comment.
Right, so forget about it already.\nYou know what they say,\nwhat happens in Okinawa, stays in Okinawa.
It's not like I did anything shameful\nto begin with.\nI was just a little curious!
(H-huh?\n Did I not give enough support there...?)
Aaah, even though she seemed\nlike she was cheering up.
Anyway, Fu-kun, you go on ahead.\nIt'll just make things more complicated\nif you stick around.
O-okay.\nSorry, I'll leave it to you guys.
(I still have a lot to learn about\n supporting others in times like these...)
